home.description:
I’m a Full Stack Developer and technology enthusiast with 6 years of self-taught experience.
I really like programming, 3d modelling and eletronic.
 Currently studying Computer Engineering at Universidade de Sorocaba (UNISO).
home.chatPlaceHolder: Want to know more about me?

OctoDev.description: Gamified learning platform for programming. Master coding through interactive challenges, skill trees, and real-time feedback.

FlexyApi.description: A AI-powered API that simulates any rest API based on a simple description. Perfect for testing and prototyping without backend setup.

Silhouettle.description: Geography game where you guess the country based on its silhouette.

Periodic Table Game.description: Memorize the periodic table with this interactive quiz.

Forkify.description: A recipe search engine that allows users to find, save, and share their favorite recipes from around the web.

Interior Consultant.description: A UI/UX Challenge of devchallenges.io. An interior design consultant website with a modern and elegant design.

RR's Dealership.description: A car dealership website with modern and elegant design, featuring over 70 car variants, each with an individual detail page.

Car Rental.description: The realization of a car rental UI that I found on pinterest. The site features a modern and elegant design

Github Profile.description: If you want to know more projects or know a little more about me, visit my Github profile.
